description_long: This nightstand features a simple, rectangular wooden table with a flat top surface, supported by four short, sturdy legs. On the tabletop, there is a red desk lamp with a round base, an open book, and a cylindrical cup or container with a purple lid. The nightstand sits on a small, dark circular rug, and is placed within a three-walled, light pink room. The design is minimalist, with no visible drawers or handles, and the legs are blocky and unadorned. The overall appearance is functional and modern, with no decorative carvings or embellishments.
description: A minimalist wooden nightstand with a flat top, block legs, a red lamp, an open book, and a cup, set on a small rug in a pink-walled room.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tabletop with a red lamp, open book, cup, and the nightstand's block legs on a circular rug.
description_view_1: Rear angled view showing the plain back and side of the nightstand and the enclosing pink walls, with tabletop items barely visible.
description_view_2: Direct rear view showing only the back of the nightstand and the pink walls, with no tabletop items visible.
description_view_3: Side-rear view showing the side and back of the nightstand, with the tabletop items mostly obscured.
